arts.ttl: Michael Owen identifies 'brilliant' replacement for Mo Salah as Liverpool star's contract saga rumbles on
arts.sum: Michael Owen has identified who Liverpool should sign as Mo Salah's replacement should the Egypt star leave Anfield this summer. Salah is in the last six months of his contract.

arts.ttl: Report: £40m player would rather sign for Liverpool than Manchester City
arts.sum: Liverpool haven’t had the best of luck in recent times when going head-to-head with their Premier League rivals in the transfer market. Leny Yoro was...

arts.ttl: Why Diogo Jota was not in Liverpool team training on Thursday as two other players missing
arts.sum: Diogo Jota was not spotted in Liverpool team training on Thursday ahead of the Reds' trip to Brentford

arts.ttl: Man Utd in INSANE transfer links to €80m Liverpool star
arts.sum: While Amorim is eager to bring in a wing-back and a midfielder, United’s struggle for consistency in attack has also left the club seeking another forward, particularly if Rashford, Antony or the misfiring Joshua Zirkzee leave this month. Liverpool would perhaps welcome an exit for Nunez after his struggles since his €85 million transfer from Benfica in 2022, although Arne Slot’s side are understood to have already rejected an approach from Saudi Arabia for the striker this month.

arts.ttl: Brentford vs. Liverpool: Time, how to watch, stats, team news
arts.sum: Arne Slot's Liverpool side head to Brentford on Saturday as they look to get back onto winning form following a 1-1 draw with Nottingham Forest on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Milos Kerkez transfer stance as Bournemouth star could answer Jamie Carragher Liverpool plea
arts.sum: Milos Kerkez has been excellent for Bournemouth in the Premier League this season and Liverpool are among those teams interested in signing him

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah has already shown Saudi hand as Liverpool contract negotiations put to the test
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah remains out of contract in the summer and is yet to agree an extension with Liverpool amid interest from Saudi Arabia

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Al-Hilal 'readying lucrative offer' for attacker
arts.sum: Saudi Pro League side Al-Hilil are allegedly readying an offer for one of Liverpool's attackers over the coming weeks.

arts.ttl: The £38m sum that might impact Liverpool transfer decision over Darwin Nunez
arts.sum: Liverpool striker Darwin Nunez has been linked with a move away from Anfield

arts.ttl: Report: With no Bayern Munich agreement yet, agent to shop Alphonso Davies to Real Madrid, Liverpool, Manchester City, Manchester United
arts.sum: The question now is whether Bayern will improve their offer again before the agent leaves, otherwise they run the risk that he could reach an agreement with another club such as Real Madrid Alphonso Davies’ agent will leave Munich tomorrow.
